{{Quote|Now to get off this crazy rock.|[[Jaden Korr]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''</ref>}}
'''Blenjeel''' was a [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] between [[Ando/Legends|Ando]] and [[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis]], located far from the major [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlanes]]. It was inhabited by enormous [[sand burrower]]s, which emerged quickly from the ground to devour unsuspecting prey. The terrain of Blenjeel was comprised mostly of wide deserts, noted for the unusual consistency of the sand, which shifted over time. Rocky outcroppings which were stable one day seemed to sink into the sand the next. These shifts were mostly attributed to the movements of the sand burrowers.

[[File:Bleenjeel2.jpg|thumb|left|250px|A desert on Blenjeel.]]
[[File:JKAlevelshot_t1_danger.png|thumb|200px|Location of Blenjeel in the galaxy.]]

[[14 ABY/Legends|Ten years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], a merchant vessel was attacked by an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] and crashed on Blenjeel, and [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] [[Jaden Korr]] was [[Mission to Blenjeel|sent]] to investigate. However, his shuttle was struck by lightning on its landing approach and also crash-landed. He was unable to save the merchants, the [[Unidentified Blenjeel shipwreck survivor|last of whom]] was eaten by a sandworm shortly after his arrival, but was able to avoid the native sandworms for long enough to salvage from the merchant's ship the parts necessary to repair his shuttle. Shortly after this, Blenjeel was listed in the [[New Republic Galactic Database]] as a dangerous planet to be avoided.

==Behind the scenes==
The concept of Blenjeel shares a similar environment to the [[Wikipedia:Dune universe|''Dune'']] planet [[W:c:dune:Arrakis|Arrakis]], a desert planet with giant [[W:c:dune:Sandworm|sandworms]].
